summary: Visual Contract Testing PASSED - All 20 backend tests passed, all frontend visual contract elements verified. Dashboard renders without runtime errors. Hero section shows poster image with FEATURED badge and CTAs. Metrics strip, story rows (Trending, Fresh, Continue, Unfinished), Features grid (3-col desktop), Activity bar, and Sticky bottom nav all render correctly per contract.

issues: Minor: fetchpriority DOM property warning in console (should be fetchPriority) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: HeroMedia.jsx: bg-[#0B0B0F], blur-2xl, bottom fade h-40, frosted badge - VERIFIED
StoryCardMedia.jsx: via-black/15 overlay, drop-shadow on title - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: hero h-[58vh]/[64vh]/[72vh], card sizes 160x220/200x280/220x300, metrics rounded-2xl, features grid-cols-1/2/3 - ALL VERIFIED
All story cards have rounded-2xl and border border-white/[0.08] - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual contract fully verified. Key findings: 1) No runtime errors (ReferenceError for 'hovered' was fixed), 2) Hero section renders poster immediately with FEATURED badge, 3) Continue Story and Remix CTAs present, 4) Metrics strip shows all 4 pills (Continue, Share, K-Factor, Live), 5) All story rows render (Trending, Fresh, Continue, Unfinished), 6) Features grid uses proper responsive columns (1/2/3), 7) Activity bar with cyan pulse dot visible, 8) Sticky bottom nav on mobile with all 5 items, 9) Story cards have correct dimensions per viewport, 10) All CSS utilities (shimmer, no-scrollbar) defined.

no_runtime_errors.details: No ReferenceError or TypeError in console

hero_poster_image.details: Hero shows poster image immediately (The Painter of Stars)

featured_badge.details: FEATURED badge visible with frosted glass styling

hero_ctas.details: Continue Story and Remix buttons present

metrics_strip.details: 4 pills: Continue (80%), Share (80%), K-Factor (2), Live - all with rounded-2xl bg-[#121218]

trending_now_row.details: 51 story cards found with thumbnails and badges

features_grid_3_column.details: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 - 10 Creator Tools items

activity_bar.details: Activity bar visible with cyan pulse dot

sticky_bottom_nav_mobile.details: Home, Explore, Create, Stories, Profile - all present

api_nested_media_object.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns nested media object for all items with media_version='v3'
